label: Terrain patches
description: Paints circular patches of a specified terrain type across the map.

terrainDef.label: Terrain def
terrainDef.description: TerrainDef painted at each patch location.

patchesPer10kCellsRange.label: Patches per 10k cells range
patchesPer10kCellsRange.description: Random range of patches to generate per 10,000 map cells.

patchSizeRange.label: Patch size range
patchSizeRange.description: Random range for the radius of each terrain patch.
